title: Mouse House Hunter
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo must sell his cozy house to save The Rodent's Gazette, then race to win it back from his rival Sally 🏠

q.en: Who broke the news that The Rodent's Gazette was going bankrupt?
q.zh: 是谁爆出《老鼠公报》即将破产的消息？

options.en: Sally Ratmousen, editor of The Daily Rat
options.zh: 《老鼠日报》的主编莎莉·拉特莫森
杰罗尼摩的妹妹蒂娜·斯蒂顿
杰罗尼摩的表哥特拉普
杰罗尼摩的侄子本杰明

explain.en: Sally Ratmousen, editor of The Rodent's Gazette's biggest competitor The Daily Rat, appeared on the news claiming the paper was closing.
explain.zh: 《老鼠公报》最大竞争对手《老鼠日报》的主编莎莉·拉特莫森在新闻中声称报社即将倒闭。

q.en: Which relative told Geronimo he must sell his house to save the newspaper?
q.zh: 是哪位亲戚告诉杰罗尼摩，必须卖掉房子来拯救报社？

options.en: His grandfather William Shortpaws (Cheap Mouse Willy)
options.zh: 他的爷爷威廉·肖特波（小气鬼威利）

explain.en: Grandfather William Shortpaws, also called Cheap Mouse Willy, told Geronimo the account was in the red and he must sell his house.
explain.zh: 外号“小气鬼威利”的爷爷威廉·肖特波告诉杰罗尼摩，账户出现赤字，他必须卖掉房子。

q.en: What is the name of Geronimo's pet fish?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩的宠物鱼叫什么名字？

explain.en: Geronimo says good-bye to his pet fish Hannibal and later keeps him safe in a fishbowl.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩向他的宠物鱼汉尼拔道别，后来一直把它养在鱼缸里。

q.en: How quickly did Cousin Trap claim to sell Geronimo's house?
q.zh: 表哥特拉普声称用了多长时间卖掉杰罗尼摩的房子？

options.en: Three hours, eight minutes, and twenty seconds

explain.en: Trap bragged, 'I sold your house in exactly THREE hours, EIGHT minutes, and twenty seconds.'
explain.zh: 特拉普炫耀道：“我卖掉你的房子，正好用了三小时八分二十秒。”

q.zh: 是谁偷偷买下了杰罗尼摩的房子？

explain.en: The folder on Trap's desk read: Buyer: Sally Ratmousen, Seller: Geronimo Stilton, Address: 8 Mouseford Lane.
explain.zh: 特拉普桌上的文件夹上写着：买家：莎莉·拉特莫森，卖家：杰罗尼摩·斯蒂顿，地址：鼠福德巷8号。

q.en: Where did Geronimo temporarily live after losing his house?
q.zh: 失去房子后，杰罗尼摩暂时住在哪里？

options.en: A little wooden house in Parmesan Park
options.zh: 帕尔马森公园里的一座小木屋

explain.en: Geronimo slept in a tiny wooden playhouse in Parmesan Park, where he once played with his sister Thea as a young mouse.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩睡在帕尔马森公园里的小木屋游乐室，他小时候曾和妹妹蒂娜在那里玩耍。

q.en: What challenge did Sally set for Geronimo to get his house back?
q.zh: 为了要回房子，莎莉给杰罗尼摩设下了什么挑战？

options.en: Get an interview with Bounce Ballmouse within twelve hours
options.zh: 在十二小时内采访到邦斯·鲍尔莫斯

options.en: Beat her in a basketball game

explain.en: Sally said she'd return the house only if Geronimo got an interview with Bounce Ballmouse, who never gives interviews, within twelve hours.
explain.zh: 莎莉说，只有杰罗尼摩在十二小时内采访到从不接受采访的邦斯·鲍尔莫斯，她才归还房子。

q.en: How did Geronimo win Bounce Ballmouse's trust?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩是如何赢得邦斯·鲍尔莫斯信任的？

options.en: He saved Bounce's mother from being hit by a truck
options.zh: 他把邦斯的妈妈从卡车前救了下来

options.en: He gave him a lot of money
He wrote a story about him
options.zh: 他写了一篇关于他的报道

explain.en: Geronimo shouted to stop an old lady from stepping in front of a truck; she turned out to be Bounce's mom, and Bounce thanked him with an interview.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩大喊，阻止一位老太太走到卡车前；她正是邦斯的妈妈，邦斯为报答他答应接受采访。

q.en: What was the real reason for the newspaper 'crisis'?
q.zh: 报社“危机”的真正原因是什么？

options.en: Sally made it up as a hoax to sell more copies of The Daily Rat
options.zh: 莎莉编造了这个骗局，好让《老鼠日报》多卖些份数
杰罗尼摩把钱挥霍光了

explain.en: The news confirmed the crisis was a hoax; Sally invented the story to sell more copies of her own newspaper.
explain.zh: 新闻证实这场危机是个骗局；莎莉编造故事，是为了让自己的报纸多卖些份数。

q.en: Who had impersonated Ledger Moneymouse at the bank?
q.zh: 在银行里假扮莱杰·莫尼莫斯的是谁？

options.en: Sally Ratmousen, wearing a rubber mask
options.zh: 戴着橡胶面具的莎莉·拉特莫森

explain.en: Moneymouse revealed someone locked him in a broom closet and took his place; the picture shows Sally Ratmousen dressed as him with a rubber mask.
explain.zh: 莫尼莫斯说有人把他锁在杂物间并顶替了他；图片显示莎莉·拉特莫森戴着橡胶面具假扮他。
